version: 2017 Trust Services Criteria (Revised Points of Focus 2022)

controls.control_name: Commitment to Integrity and Ethical Values
controls.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values through organizational standards, policies, and practices that guide behavior.
controls.required_evidence: Code of conduct/ethics policy; Annual employee acknowledgment records; Disciplinary action procedures and records; Ethics hotline/whistleblower mechanism documentation; Board or committee oversight of ethics program
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Code of conduct with current review date. Inspect: Sample of 25 employee acknowledgments. Inquire: HR on disciplinary process.

controls.description: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight of the development and performance of internal controls.
controls.required_evidence: Board/committee charter; Board meeting minutes with security discussion; Board member independence disclosures; Security metrics actually presented to board (deck/report); Audit committee reports
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Board minutes from each quarter. Inspect: Security metrics report presented. Inquire: CISO on board reporting cadence.

controls.control_name: Management Establishes Structure, Authority, and Responsibility
controls.description: Management establishes, with board oversight, structures, reporting lines, and appropriate authorities and responsibilities in the pursuit of objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Organizational chart with security reporting lines; RACI matrix for security functions; CISO/security leadership job descriptions; Documented delegation of authority; Security team structure documentation
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Org chart showing CISO reporting line. Inspect: RACI matrix. Inspect: CISO job description.

controls.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent individuals in alignment with objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Job descriptions with security requirements; Background check policy and completion records; Security training program with 100% completion tracking; Performance evaluations referencing security; Professional development records; Onboarding training evidence
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Background check records for sample of hires. Inspect: Training completion report. Inspect: Sample job descriptions.

controls.description: The entity holds individuals accountable for their internal control responsibilities in the pursuit of objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Performance reviews referencing security; Documented consequences for violations; Security KPIs assigned to individuals; Incident accountability documentation; Signed acknowledgment forms; Disciplinary action evidence
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Sample performance reviews. Inspect: Violation records and outcomes. Inquire: HR on accountability enforcement.

controls.description: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal controls.
controls.required_evidence: Information classification policy; Data inventory and data flow diagrams; Security information sources (threat intel, vulnerability databases); SIEM/security dashboard configurations; Log management and retention policy
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Data flow diagrams. Inspect: SIEM dashboard config. Inspect: Log retention settings. Inquire: IT on threat intel sources.

controls.description: The entity internally communicates information, including objectives and responsibilities for internal control, necessary to support the functioning of internal controls.
controls.required_evidence: Security awareness training materials and completion records; Internal security communications; Policy distribution with acknowledgment logs; Onboarding training completion records; Incident communication procedures and templates
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Training completion report. Inspect: Internal security communications. Inspect: Policy acknowledgment records for new hires.

controls.description: The entity communicates with external parties regarding matters affecting the functioning of internal controls.
controls.required_evidence: External Trust Center or security page; Customer security notification procedures; Vendor/partner security communication; Regulatory notification procedures; Breach notification policy with timelines; NDA templates; SOC 2 report distribution process
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Trust Center content. Inspect: Breach notification templates. Inspect: NDA templates. Inquire: On customer communication process.

controls.description: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risks relating to objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Documented security objectives; Information security policy stating objectives; Risk appetite and tolerance statements; SLAs defining security commitments; Annual security strategy/roadmap
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Security policy with objectives. Inspect: Risk appetite statement. Inspect: Security roadmap.

controls.description: The entity identifies risks to the achievement of its objectives and analyzes risks as a basis for determining how they should be managed.
controls.required_evidence: Formal risk assessment report (annual); Risk register with likelihood, impact, owners, treatment plans; Threat modeling documentation; Vulnerability assessment reports; Risk assessment methodology
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Annual risk assessment. Inspect: Risk register. Inspect: Scoring methodology. Reperform: Verify ratings for sample of 5 risks.

controls.description: The entity considers the potential for fraud in assessing risks to the achievement of objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Fraud risk assessment; Anti-fraud policy; Segregation of duties (SoD) matrix; Whistleblower mechanism; Management override controls and testing evidence; SoD enforcement evidence; SoD conflict reports
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Fraud risk assessment. Inspect: SoD matrix. Reperform: Verify SoD for sample of 5 privileged users. Inspect: Whistleblower mechanism.

controls.description: The entity identifies and assesses changes that could significantly impact the system of internal control.
controls.required_evidence: Change impact assessment procedures; New vendor/system/regulation risk evaluation process; M&A security assessment procedures; Regulatory change monitoring; Risk reassessment evidence triggered by changes
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Change impact procedure. Inspect: Risk reassessment evidence during audit period. Inquire: On regulatory change monitoring.

controls.description: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations to ascertain whether the components of internal control are present and functioning.
controls.required_evidence: Continuous monitoring configurations (SIEM, GRC dashboards); Internal audit reports and schedules; Control self-assessment results; Penetration testing reports (annual); Automated compliance monitoring evidence; Quarterly control effectiveness reviews
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: SIEM monitoring config. Inspect: Pen test report. Inspect: Compliance monitoring dashboard. Inspect: Internal audit reports.

controls.description: The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies in a timely manner to those parties responsible for taking corrective action.
controls.required_evidence: Deficiency tracking log with timelines and owners; Management reporting on deficiencies; Audit finding remediation tracking; Escalation procedures for critical deficiencies; Corrective action completion evidence
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Deficiency tracking log. Inspect: Executive review and sign-off. Inspect: Sample of 5 closed deficiencies.

controls.description: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks to acceptable levels.
controls.required_evidence: Control-to-risk mapping; Control design documentation (preventive/detective mix); ITGC documentation; Application control documentation; Control selection rationale
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Control-to-risk mapping. Inspect: ITGC documentation. Inquire: On control selection rationale for top 5 risks.

controls.description: The entity selects and develops general control activities over technology to support the achievement of objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Infrastructure security configurations; Network architecture diagrams; EDR deployment evidence (100% coverage); Database security configs; CSPM scan results with remediation; WAF configurations; Firewall rule reviews
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Network architecture. Inspect: EDR deployment status. Inspect: CSPM compliance report. Inspect: Firewall/WAF configs.

controls.description: The entity deploys control activities through policies that establish what is expected and in procedures that put policies into action.
controls.required_evidence: Complete policy library with version control, review dates, and approval signatures; Annual review evidence; Employee acknowledgment records; Procedure documents; Policy exception register
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Policy register with review dates/approvers. Inspect: Sample of 10 employee acknowledgments. Inspect: Exception register.

controls.description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets.
controls.required_evidence: SSO configuration evidence; MFA enforcement (all accounts); Firewall rules and network segmentation; WAF configurations; VPN configs for remote access; IdP Conditional Access policies
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: SSO config. Inspect: MFA policy. Inspect: Firewall/security group rules. Observe: Conditional Access policies.

controls.description: Prior to issuing system credentials, the entity registers and authorizes new internal and external users.
controls.required_evidence: Provisioning workflow documentation; Access request and manager approval evidence; Background check confirmation before account creation; Onboarding checklist; Automated provisioning configs (SCIM)
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Provisioning workflow. Inspect: Sample of 25 new hires showing approval before account creation. Reperform: Verify creation date vs. clearance.

controls.description: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access based on roles, responsibilities, or system design.
controls.required_evidence: RBAC matrix; Least privilege enforcement evidence; Role definitions mapped to job functions; Access modification tickets; PAM tool configurations; Privileged access register (quarterly review); Quarterly access review reports
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: RBAC matrix. Inspect: Quarterly access reviews. Inspect: Privileged access register. Reperform: Verify access for sample of 25 users.

controls.description: The entity restricts physical access to facilities and protected information assets to authorized personnel.
controls.required_evidence: Badge reader configurations; Visitor management logs; Data center access procedures/logs; Surveillance documentation; Clean desk policy; Cloud provider SOC 2 for data center physical security
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Badge access logs. Inspect: Visitor logs. Inspect: Cloud provider SOC 2 physical section. Observe: Physical controls.

controls.description: The entity discontinues logical and physical protections only after the ability to protect information is no longer needed.
controls.required_evidence: Offboarding checklist with full access revocation; Timely removal evidence (within 24 hours for terminations); Access modification for role changes (movers); Automated deprovisioning; Quarterly access review removing stale accounts; Terminated user audit logs
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: All terminations — verify disable within 24 hours. Inspect: Role changes — verify old permissions removed. Inspect: Quarterly reviews. Reperform: Check for active terminated accounts.

controls.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon unauthorized or malicious software.
controls.required_evidence: EDR deployment (100% coverage); Anti-malware configs and signature currency; Email security gateway; Content filtering/DLP; MDM policies; Application whitelisting; Device compliance enforcement
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: EDR deployment status. Inspect: Email gateway config. Inspect: Device compliance policy. Observe: EDR console.

controls.description: The entity protects information during transmission, movement, and removal through encryption.
controls.required_evidence: TLS 1.2+ enforcement (TLS 1.3 preferred); AES-256 encryption at rest; Key management and rotation evidence (annual); VPN encryption; Email encryption; Certificate management; Legacy TLS disabled
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Encryption at rest configs. Inspect: Key rotation logs. Inspect: TLS on load balancers. Reperform: Test TLS on sample endpoints.

controls.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect unauthorized credential use.
controls.required_evidence: Password policy (14+ chars, complexity, history, banned list); MFA across all critical systems; Secrets management (no hardcoded creds); Service account rotation (90-day max); Lockout config (5 attempts); Lockout alerting; Quarterly MFA audit
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Password policy config. Inspect: MFA status report. Inspect: Secrets management. Inspect: Service account rotation log.

controls.description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users and processes through data loss prevention controls, approved transfer channels, and removable media restrictions.
controls.required_evidence: Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policy configurations; USB and removable media port restrictions; Approved data transfer channels documented; Prohibition of sensitive data via unapproved channels; Cloud storage public access blocks; Pre-commit scanning for secrets/sensitive data
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: DLP policy configurations. Inspect: USB restriction settings on sample endpoints. Inspect: Cloud storage public access blocks. Inspect: Code repository secret scanning configuration.

controls.description: The entity uses detection and monitoring to identify configuration changes introducing vulnerabilities and anomalies.
controls.required_evidence: SIEM config and alert rules; IDS/IPS evidence; FIM configurations; Cloud config monitoring (AWS Config, Azure Policy); Anomaly detection rules; SOC procedures; Weekly alert review evidence
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: SIEM alert rules. Inspect: Cloud config compliance. Inspect: FIM config. Inspect: Weekly alert review logs.

controls.description: The entity monitors system components for anomalies indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors.
controls.required_evidence: Security monitoring dashboard; Centralized logging config; Alert notification and escalation (defined SLAs); Event correlation rules; 24/7 monitoring evidence (SOC or MSSP); Daily alert review; Weekly CISO summary; Uptime monitoring
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: SIEM dashboard. Inspect: Daily alert review logs. Inspect: Weekly CISO summary. Observe: Alert escalation.

controls.control_name: Security Event Evaluation and Incident Response
controls.description: The entity evaluates security events to determine if they are incidents and responds per defined policies, including notification to affected parties.
controls.required_evidence: Incident Response Plan; Severity matrix (Critical/High/Medium/Low); IR team roles and escalation paths; Playbooks for common scenarios; Incident ticket logs; Post-incident reviews for Critical/High; Tabletop exercises (annual); Notification procedures for individuals, regulators, customers
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: IRP. Inspect: All incident tickets. Inspect: Post-incident reviews. Inspect: Tabletop records. Inspect: Notification procedures.

controls.description: The entity responds to incidents by executing activities to mitigate impact and recover operations.
controls.required_evidence: BCP; DRP; RTO/RPO definitions; Backup config and restore testing; Failover/redundancy documentation; DR test results (annual); Communication templates for incident notification
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: BCP and DRP. Inspect: RTO/RPO definitions. Inspect: DR test results. Inspect: Backup restore logs.

controls.description: The entity identifies, evaluates, and manages vulnerabilities in infrastructure and software.
controls.required_evidence: Scanning configs/schedules (infra weekly, endpoints monthly, code per-PR); Scan reports with remediation tracking; Patching SLAs (Critical 7d, High 30d, Medium 90d, Low 180d); SLA compliance metrics; Pen test report (annual); CVSS classification; Vulnerability register
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Scan reports. Inspect: SLA compliance report. Inspect: Pen test. Inspect: Vuln register. Reperform: Verify remediation for sample of 10 critical/high.

controls.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures.
controls.required_evidence: Change management policy (Standard/Normal/Emergency classification); Change request and approval workflow; SoD evidence (no self-approval to production); Peer review records; Emergency change retrospective reviews; Test environment validation evidence; Version control and branch protection; IaC change logs
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Change policy. Inspect: Sample of 25 change tickets (full lifecycle). Inspect: Branch protection / SoD enforcement. Inspect: Emergency change retrospectives. Inspect: Environment separation. Reperform: Verify no self-approvals.

controls.description: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions.
controls.required_evidence: Risk treatment plans with owners and dates; BIA; BCP with testing evidence; DRP with testing evidence; Cyber liability insurance; Risk acceptance with executive sign-off for High/Critical risks
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Risk register treatment plans. Inspect: BIA. Inspect: BCP/DRP test results. Inspect: Insurance policy. Inspect: Risk acceptance sign-offs.

controls.description: The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners.
controls.required_evidence: Vendor risk management policy; Vendor inventory with risk ratings; Vendor security assessments (SIG, CAIQ); Vendor SOC 2 report reviews (annual); Contract review for security clauses; Ongoing monitoring evidence; Subservice organization documentation; Vendor access reviews (quarterly)
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Vendor inventory. Inspect: Assessments for critical vendors. Inspect: SOC 2 reviews. Inspect: Contract samples. Inspect: Vendor access reviews.

controls.description: The entity maintains, monitors, and evaluates current processing capacity to manage demand and enable additional capacity.
controls.required_evidence: Capacity monitoring dashboards with alerts (75% warning, 90% critical); Auto-scaling configs; Quarterly capacity forecast reports; Performance monitoring; Load testing results; Resource utilization reports
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Monitoring dashboards/alerts. Inspect: Quarterly capacity reports. Inspect: Auto-scaling configs.

controls.description: The entity designs, implements, and monitors environmental protections, data backup, and recovery infrastructure.
controls.required_evidence: Backup policy and schedules; Backup success/failure reports monthly; Restore testing (quarterly recommended); Geographic redundancy/failover; Backup encryption; Cloud provider SOC 2 for environmental controls; Backup failure investigation evidence
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Backup job logs. Inspect: Restore test results. Inspect: Cloud provider SOC 2 environmental sections. Inspect: Backup encryption.

controls.description: The entity tests recovery plan procedures supporting system recovery.
controls.required_evidence: DR test plans and results (annual); BCP tabletop exercises; Failover testing; Backup restore verification logs; Post-test remediation tracking; RTO/RPO validation; Executive sign-off on results
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: DR test results. Inspect: Tabletop records. Inspect: Executive sign-off. Inspect: Remediation tracking.

controls.description: The entity communicates availability incidents, outages, and service degradations to affected customers and stakeholders through defined channels and procedures.
controls.required_evidence: Status page or customer communication channel; SLA breach notification procedures and templates; Root cause analysis communication templates; Stakeholder notification timeline requirements; Evidence of customer communications for outages during audit period
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Status page or communication channel. Inspect: SLA notification templates. Inspect: Customer communications for any outages. Inquire: On availability incident communication process.

controls.control_name: Data Processing Completeness, Accuracy, and Timeliness
controls.description: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant quality information regarding processing objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Input validation controls; Data reconciliation procedures/reports; Error handling and logging; Automated data quality checks; Transaction monitoring and exception reporting; Processing specifications documentation
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Input validation docs. Inspect: Reconciliation reports. Inspect: Error handling logs.

controls.description: The entity implements controls over system inputs to ensure accuracy and completeness.
controls.required_evidence: Input validation rules; Data type/format enforcement; Duplicate detection; Authorization controls for input (RBAC); Error handling and rejection procedures; API input validation; OWASP input controls
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Input validation rules for critical APIs. Inspect: API validation configs. Inspect: Error handling procedures.

controls.description: The entity implements controls over system processing to ensure accuracy and completeness.
controls.required_evidence: Error monitoring and alerting; Error logs and resolution tracking; Data integrity checks; Reconciliation reports; Exception handling; Correction and reprocessing procedures
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Error monitoring config. Inspect: Error resolution logs. Inspect: Reconciliation reports.

controls.description: The entity implements controls to ensure system output is complete, accurate, and distributed only to authorized recipients.
controls.required_evidence: Output validation procedures; Report generation verification; Distribution controls (RBAC); Output logging and audit trail; Automated completeness checks; Authorization for report distribution
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Output validation procedures. Inspect: Distribution controls. Inspect: Output audit logs.

controls.description: The entity implements controls to ensure stored data maintains integrity, including detection and correction of corruption.
controls.required_evidence: Database integrity checks (referential integrity, constraints); Checksum/hash verification; Corruption detection mechanisms; Storage versioning/object lock; Backup integrity verification
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: DB integrity check configs. Inspect: Storage versioning. Inspect: Backup integrity logs.

controls.control_name: Identification and Classification of Confidential Information
controls.description: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information to meet confidentiality objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Data classification policy; Data inventory with classification labels; Confidential data identification procedures; Handling guidelines by classification; Labeling/tagging procedures; DLP configurations; Periodic classification audit; Data flow diagrams
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Classification policy. Inspect: Resource tags. Inspect: Data inventory. Inspect: DLP config. Inspect: Classification audits.

controls.description: The entity disposes of confidential information to meet confidentiality objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Retention and disposal policy; Cloud lifecycle policies; Secure destruction procedures (cryptographic erasure, NIST 800-88); Certificates of destruction; Device wipe records; Hardware disposal procedures; Disposal verification evidence
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Cloud lifecycle policies. Inspect: Device wipe records. Inspect: Destruction certificates.

controls.description: The entity provides notice to data subjects about its privacy practices to meet its privacy objectives.
controls.required_evidence: Public privacy policy (current); Cookie consent mechanism; Consent collection records; Notice update/distribution procedures; Opt-in/opt-out mechanisms; Records of processing activities (ROPA)
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Privacy policy with review date. Inspect: Cookie consent mechanism. Inspect: ROPA.

controls.description: The entity communicates choices available regarding collection, use, retention, disclosure, and disposal of personal information.
controls.required_evidence: Consent preference center/portal; Marketing opt-out mechanisms; Do Not Sell/Share configs (CCPA); Preference tracking; Third-party sharing consent records; Cookie preference tool
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Consent preference center. Inspect: Opt-out mechanisms. Inspect: Cookie management tool.

controls.description: The entity collects personal information only for the purposes identified in the notice and with consent.
controls.required_evidence: Data minimization policy; Collection purpose documentation; Privacy impact assessments (PIAs); Collection limitation enforcement in code; API collection audit logs; Third-party SDK review
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: PIAs from audit period. Inspect: API collection configs. Inquire: On collection limitation.

controls.description: The entity communicates the consequences of withholding or withdrawing consent for the collection of personal information.
controls.required_evidence: Consent withdrawal process documentation; Communication to users about consequences of non-consent; UI/UX showing opt-out implications; Records of consent withdrawal requests processed
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Consent withdrawal documentation. Inspect: UI showing opt-out consequences. Inspect: Withdrawal request records.

controls.description: The entity limits the use of personal information to the purposes identified in the notice and for which consent was obtained.
controls.required_evidence: Purpose limitation documentation; Use restriction enforcement evidence; Access controls limiting use to stated purpose; Audit of data usage against stated purposes
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Purpose limitation documentation. Inspect: Access controls. Inquire: On use limitation enforcement.

controls.description: The entity retains personal information only for the period necessary to fulfill the stated purposes or as required by law.
controls.required_evidence: Data retention schedule with defined periods; Automated retention enforcement (lifecycle policies); Annual retention review documentation; Evidence of data deleted per schedule
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Retention schedule. Inspect: Automated lifecycle configs. Inspect: Annual retention review. Inspect: Deletion records.

controls.description: The entity securely disposes of personal information when it is no longer needed for the stated purposes.
controls.required_evidence: Secure disposal procedures; Disposal verification records; Cryptographic erasure or NIST 800-88 evidence; Device wipe records; Certificate of destruction for physical media
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Disposal procedures. Inspect: Verification records. Inspect: Destruction certificates.

controls.description: The entity grants data subjects the ability to access their stored personal information.
controls.required_evidence: DSAR procedures; DSAR tracking and response time records; Self-service access portal (if applicable); Identity verification procedures; Response time compliance (30d GDPR, 45d CCPA)
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: DSAR procedures. Inspect: DSAR tracking log. Inspect: Response time compliance.

controls.description: The entity makes corrections, amendments, or deletions to personal information based on data subject requests.
controls.required_evidence: Data correction/deletion workflow; Correction request tracking; Evidence of corrections completed during audit period; Notification to third parties of corrections (where disclosed)
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Correction workflow. Inspect: Correction request log. Inspect: Third-party notification evidence.

controls.description: The entity discloses personal information to third parties only for identified purposes and with consent.
controls.required_evidence: Data Processing Agreements (DPAs); Third-party data sharing agreements; Data sharing audit logs; Sub-processor list with advance notification; Cross-border transfer mechanisms (SCCs, BCRs)
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: DPA inventory. Inspect: Sub-processor list. Inspect: Cross-border transfer docs. Inspect: Sample DPAs.

controls.description: The entity creates and maintains accurate records of authorized disclosures of personal information.
controls.required_evidence: Disclosure log documenting all authorized sharing events; Recipient identification; Purpose of disclosure; Date and scope of disclosed data; Retention of disclosure records per policy
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Disclosure log from audit period. Inspect: Sample records for completeness.

controls.description: The entity creates and maintains records of detected or reported unauthorized disclosures of personal information.
controls.required_evidence: Unauthorized disclosure/breach log; Incident records for privacy breaches; Root cause analysis; Remediation actions taken; Evidence of notification to affected individuals
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Unauthorized disclosure log. Inspect: Breach incident records. Inspect: Notification evidence.

controls.description: The entity obtains and assesses privacy commitments of third parties to whom personal information is disclosed.
controls.required_evidence: Vendor privacy assessments; DPA clauses covering privacy obligations; Evidence of vendor privacy practice review; Vendor privacy certification review (SOC 2, ISO 27701)
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Vendor privacy assessments. Inspect: DPA privacy clauses. Inquire: On vendor privacy evaluation.

controls.description: The entity receives and processes notification of privacy breaches or incidents from third parties.
controls.required_evidence: Contractual requirement for vendor breach notification (72-hour clause); Vendor breach notification receipt log; Process for evaluating third-party breach impact; Escalation procedures
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Vendor contract breach notification clauses. Inspect: Breach receipt log (if any events). Inspect: Escalation procedures.

controls.description: The entity provides timely notification to affected data subjects following a breach of personal information.
controls.required_evidence: Breach notification policy with statutory timelines; Notification templates; Evidence of notifications sent (if breaches occurred); Regulatory notification records; Communication log
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Breach notification policy. Inspect: Notification templates. Inspect: Notification records (if applicable).

controls.control_name: Communication of Privacy Practices Upon Request
controls.description: The entity communicates details of its privacy practices to data subjects upon request.
controls.required_evidence: Privacy inquiry response procedures; Records of privacy inquiries received and responses provided; Average response time tracking; Publicly available privacy documentation
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Privacy inquiry procedures. Inspect: Inquiry response log. Inspect: Public privacy documentation.

controls.description: The entity collects and maintains accurate, complete, and relevant personal information.
controls.required_evidence: Data quality procedures; Validation rules for personal information; Accuracy audit records; User profile update mechanisms; Deduplication processes; Quality monitoring reports
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Data quality procedures. Inspect: Validation rules. Inspect: Quality reports.

controls.description: The entity monitors compliance with privacy policies and addresses privacy-related complaints and disputes.
controls.required_evidence: Privacy compliance monitoring procedures; Complaint handling process; Privacy incident response procedures; DPO appointment (if required); Privacy audit reports; Regulatory inquiry response procedures; Privacy training records
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: Privacy monitoring procedures. Inspect: Complaint log. Inspect: Privacy training completion. Inspect: Privacy audit findings.
